reasoning: Koren, your primary limiter is lactate clearance and aerobics base. Your last ride showed a recovery trend, so we're ready for a challenge. This workout targets the 25W drop from your power curve. It will boost your resistance to fatigue, improving your performance on climbs like the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Over-unders: Alternate 6 mins at 209-218W and 3 mins at 242-249W. Repeat for 5 rounds.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
